en: An oracle concerning Egypt. Behold, the LORD is riding on a swift cloud and comes to Egypt; and the idols of Egypt will tremble at his presence, and the heart of the Egyptians will melt within them.
zh: 關於埃及的默示： 看哪！耶和華駕著輕快的雲， 來到埃及； 埃及的偶像在他面前戰兢， 埃及人的心都驚怕。

en: And I will stir up Egyptians against Egyptians, and they will fight, each against another and each against his neighbor, city against city, kingdom against kingdom;
zh: 我要激動埃及人去攻擊埃及人， 他們就相爭起來，各人攻擊自己的兄弟，各人攻擊自己的鄰舍， 城攻擊城；國攻擊國。

en: and the spirit of the Egyptians within them will be emptied out, and I will confound their counsel; and they will inquire of the idols and the sorcerers, and the mediums and the necromancers;
zh: 埃及人的意志必消沉， 我要破壞他們的計謀； 他們必求問偶像、念咒的、 交鬼的和行巫術的。

en: and I will give over the Egyptians into the hand of a hard master, and a fierce king will rule over them, declares the Lord GOD of hosts.
zh: 我必把埃及人交在殘暴的主人手中； 兇猛的君王要管轄他們；這是主萬軍之耶和華說的。

en: And the waters of the sea will be dried up, and the river will be dry and parched,
zh: 海中的眾水必乾透， 河床必枯竭乾涸。

en: and its canals will become foul, and the branches of Egypt's Nile will diminish and dry up, reeds and rushes will rot away.
zh: 河道必發臭， 埃及眾河流的水必消退乾涸； 葦子和蘆荻都必枯萎。

en: There will be bare places by the Nile, on the brink of the Nile, and all that is sown by the Nile will be parched, will be driven away, and will be no more.
zh: 尼羅河旁、尼羅河口的草田， 以及沿著尼羅河所種的田都必枯乾， 被吹散，不再存在。

en: The fishermen will mourn and lament, all who cast a hook in the Nile; and they will languish who spread nets on the water.
zh: 打魚的人必哀號； 所有在尼羅河上垂釣的必悲傷； 那些在水面上撒網的，必灰心難過。

en: The workers in combed flax will be in despair, and the weavers of white cotton.
zh: 那些用梳好的麻來紡紗的， 和那些織白布的，都必羞愧。

en: Those who are the pillars of the land will be crushed, and all who work for pay will be grieved.
zh: 埃及的柱石必被打碎， 所有受雇的工人也必心裡憂愁。

en: The princes of Zoan are utterly foolish; the wisest counselors of Pharaoh give stupid counsel. How can you say to Pharaoh, "I am a son of the wise, a son of ancient kings"?
zh: 瑣安的領袖非常愚昧， 法老那些最有智慧的謀士所籌算的， 都成為愚昧。 你們怎能對法老說： “我是智慧人的兒子，是古代君王的後裔”呢？

en: Where then are your wise men? Let them tell you that they might know what the LORD of hosts has purposed against Egypt.
zh: 你的智慧人在哪裡呢？ 萬軍之耶和華向埃及所定的旨意是怎樣的？ 就讓他們告訴你，使你知道吧！

en: The princes of Zoan have become fools, and the princes of Memphis are deluded; those who are the cornerstones of her tribes have made Egypt stagger.
zh: 瑣安的領袖都變為愚昧， 挪弗的領袖都受了欺騙； 那些在埃及支派中作房角石的， 使埃及人走錯了路。

en: The LORD has mingled within her a spirit of confusion, and they will make Egypt stagger in all its deeds, as a drunken man staggers in his vomit.
zh: 耶和華讓歪曲的靈攙入埃及當中， 以致他們使埃及一切所作的都有謬誤， 好像醉酒的人嘔吐的時候，東倒西歪一樣。

en: And there will be nothing for Egypt that head or tail, palm branch or reed, may do.
zh: 無論是頭或尾、棕枝或蘆葦所作的， 都不能為埃及成就甚麼事。

en: In that day the Egyptians will be like women, and tremble with fear before the hand that the LORD of hosts shakes over them.
zh: 到那日，埃及人必像婦人一樣。他們必因萬軍之耶和華在埃及之上揮手而戰兢恐懼。

en: And the land of Judah will become a terror to the Egyptians. Everyone to whom it is mentioned will fear because of the purpose that the LORD of hosts has purposed against them.
zh: 猶大地必使埃及驚恐；無論誰向埃及人提起猶大地，他們都懼怕，因為這是萬軍之耶和華向埃及所定的旨意。

en: In that day there will be five cities in the land of Egypt that speak the language of Canaan and swear allegiance to the LORD of hosts. One of these will be called the City of Destruction.
zh: 到那日，埃及地必有五座城的人說迦南的方言，又指著萬軍之耶和華起誓，必有一座城稱為“毀滅城” 。

en: In that day there will be an altar to the LORD in the midst of the land of Egypt, and a pillar to the LORD at its border.
zh: 到那日，在埃及地必有一座獻給耶和華的祭壇；在埃及的邊界上必有一根獻給耶和華的柱子。

en: It will be a sign and a witness to the LORD of hosts in the land of Egypt. When they cry to the LORD because of oppressors, he will send them a savior and defender, and deliver them.
zh: 這都要在埃及地作萬軍之耶和華的記號和證據。埃及人因受人欺壓向耶和華哀求的時候，他就差派一位拯救者和維護者到他們那裡，他必拯救他們。

en: And the LORD will make himself known to the Egyptians, and the Egyptians will know the LORD in that day and worship with sacrifice and offering, and they will make vows to the LORD and perform them.
zh: 耶和華必被埃及人認識。到那日，埃及人必認識耶和華；他們也要用祭物和供物來敬拜他，並且向耶和華許願、還願。

en: And the LORD will strike Egypt, striking and healing, and they will return to the LORD, and he will listen to their pleas for mercy and heal them.
zh: 耶和華必擊打埃及，既擊打、又醫治，他們就回轉歸向耶和華，他必應允他們的禱告，醫治他們。

en: In that day there will be a highway from Egypt to Assyria, and Assyria will come into Egypt, and Egypt into Assyria, and the Egyptians will worship with the Assyrians.
zh: 到那日，必有一條從埃及通到亞述的大道；亞述人要進到埃及，埃及人也要進入亞述；埃及人要與亞述人一同敬拜耶和華。

en: In that day Israel will be the third with Egypt and Assyria, a blessing in the midst of the earth,
zh: 到那日，以色列必與埃及和亞述一起成為地上列國的祝福。

en: whom the LORD of hosts has blessed, saying, "Blessed be Egypt my people, and Assyria the work of my hands, and Israel my inheritance."
zh: 萬軍之耶和華賜福給他們，說：“我的子民埃及，我手的工程亞述，我的產業以色列，都是有福的！”
